recommendations.title: Revenge of the Ninja
recommendations.overview: A peaceful ex-ninja's life shatters when his son's kidnapping forces him back into violence amid an American-Japanese criminal drug war.

recommendations.title: Ninja III: The Domination
recommendations.overview: An aerobics instructor becomes a ruthless assassin after being possessed by a slain ninja's spirit, leading to a showdown with a martial arts expert.

recommendations.title: American Ninja
recommendations.overview: Joe Armstrong, an orphaned drifter with little respect for much other than martial arts, finds himself on an American Army base in The Philippines after a judge gives him a choice of enlistment or prison. On one of his first missions driving a convoy

recommendations.title: The Suicide Squad
recommendations.overview: Supervillains Harley Quinn, Bloodsport, Peacemaker and a collection of nutty cons at Belle Reve prison join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X as they are dropped off at the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.

recommendations.title: American Ninja 5
recommendations.overview: When a scientists daughter is kidnapped, American Ninja, attempts to find her, but this time he teams up with a youngster he has trained in the ways of the ninja.

recommendations.title: Predator: Killer of Killers
recommendations.overview: While three of the fiercest warriors in human history—a Viking raider, a ninja in feudal Japan, and a WWII pilot—are killers in their own right, they are merely prey for their new opponent: the ultimate killer of killers.

recommendations.title: Twin Peaks
recommendations.overview: An idiosyncratic FBI agent investigates the murder of a young woman in the even more idiosyncratic town of Twin Peaks. (This standalone version of the series pilot was produced for the European VHS market and has an alternate, closed ending.)

recommendations.title: War Machine
recommendations.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

recommendations.title: Dog
recommendations.overview: An army ranger and his dog embark on a road trip along the Pacific Coast Highway to attend a friend's funeral.

recommendations.title: American Ninja 4: The Annihilation
recommendations.overview: The two American Ninjas, Joe Armstrong and Sean Davidson, team up to do battle against a terrorist and his band of Ninjas.
